changes: Resolved an issue wherein auto-attacks generated incorrect enmity while under the effects of Sword Oath.
Players can now queue abilities immediately following the use of a weaponskill or spell.
The Echo will now be applied to pets.
All PvP actions will be available upon unlocking the Wolves' Den.
A Default button has been added to the PvP Profile window under Actions & Traits to reset all enhancements.
The item The Fury's Anthem can no longer be used or purchased.
All PvP action and trait enhancements now require four action points.
Character titles have been adjusted to display the opponents' class or job.
The Frontline category has been added to the PvP Profile window.
PvP actions and traits can now be used in the Wolves' Den Pier.
A message will no longer be displayed in the log window when an enemy is marked with a sign in the Wolves' Den.

new_content.name: Saga of the Zodiac Weapons
new_content.description: Questline involving the creation of Relic Weapon Novus through the infusion of sphere scrolls with materia.

new_content.name: Celestial Radiance
new_content.description: Side story quest required to progress the Saga of the Zodiac Weapons.

new_content.name: Star Light, Star Bright
new_content.description: Side story quest required to progress the Saga of the Zodiac Weapons.

new_content.name: A Sight to Behold
new_content.description: Quest to unlock the Sightseeing Log.

new_content.name: Sightseeing Log
new_content.description: System allowing players to explore the realm and compile a record of landscapes and vistas.

new_content.name: Gear Preview
new_content.description: Feature allowing players to use the 'Try On' subcommand to preview gear in various windows.

new_content.name: Binding Coil of Bahamut
new_content.description: Dungeon where jumping platform behavior for pets has been updated.

new_content.name: Second Coil of Bahamut
new_content.description: Dungeon where pet and visual adjustments were implemented.

new_content.name: Thornmarch (Extreme)
new_content.description: Trial now available to queue solo via Duty Finder.

new_content.name: The Whorleater (Extreme)
new_content.description: Trial now available to queue solo via Duty Finder.

new_content.name: Wolves' Den Pier
new_content.description: Exploration/PvP area where striking dummies have been placed and action usage is enabled.
